steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The phrase "Despite being cheap, versatile, and easy to produce" must describe the noun that immediately follows it. Since those qualities belong to commercial plastics, the main clause needs to start with commercial plastics, not with an abstract placeholder or with the problems.

steps.title: Avoid dangling subjects
steps.content: A places "there" after the modifier, while B and C make the problems seem cheap, versatile, and easy to produce. The completion that starts with commercial plastics also gives "they" a clear antecedent. The answer is D.
